subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by the yearning of the hearts of them that love Thee, and by the sighs of them that pine for Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک بحنین قلوب العاشقین و زفرات افئده المشتاقین و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat]
